DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASHCALL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMASSON, MICHAEL $2,281.56 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,381.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
